title: Trump admin removed 57 things from national parks. Here's the list.
shortDescription: Among the 57 items that the Trump administration removed from national parks were junior ranger books and portrait descriptions.

title: How does Trump's preliminary Iran deal compare with Obama's Iran deal?
shortDescription: President Trump's memorandum was the second attempt by the United States in recent years to prevent Iran from developing a nuclear weapon.

title: Trump was notably absent from the Obama Presidential Center dedication
shortDescription: The Obama Presidential Center dedication ceremony was a bi-partisan affair with presidents Biden, Clinton and Bush in attendance. Trump was not.

title: Trump honors three U.S. service members with Medal of Honor
shortDescription: The Medal of Honor was awarded to Marines James Capers, John Ripley and Army Maj. Nicholas Dockery at the White House.

title: Supreme Court Justice Jackson calls for scrapping gun law test
shortDescription: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson says the Supreme Court's historical test for gun laws is 'unworkable' and needs to go.

title: Students for Trump co-founder tied to Secret Service impersonation case
shortDescription: Police alleged Jordan Daley posed as an agent protecting Students for Trump co-founder Ryan Fournier and planned to attend the UFC Freedom 250 event with guns.

title: Americans' approval of Trump's economy reaches new low in latest poll
shortDescription: Only a third of Americans approve of the way President Donald Trump has handled the economy, according to a new PBS News/NPR/Marist poll.

title: Remember hope and change? Obama Center opens while Trump looms
shortDescription: The star-studded celebration on Chicago's South Side, with former presidents Clinton, Bush and Biden on the scene, echoes an earlier time.

title: Obama subtly jabs Trump at center opening
shortDescription: At the Obama Presidential Center opening ceremony, former President Barack Obama subtly jabbed at President Donald Trump without naming him.

title: Trump pledges $300B redevelopment fund in Iran deal. But who's paying?
shortDescription: Trump's memorandum of understanding with Iran would set up a $300B redevelopment fund for Iran. Who's paying into the fund isn't clear.
